title: Minimum and Maximum
description: Given an array of n integers, find the minimum and the maximum element.
inputSpec: First line: n. Second line: n space-separated integers.
outputSpec: Two integers on one line: the minimum then the maximum, separated by a space.

botCodes.code: let()=let n=Scanf.scanf" %d" Fun.id in let a=Array.init n(fun _->Scanf.scanf" %d" Fun.id) in Printf.printf"%d %d\n"(Array.fold_left min a.(0) a)(Array.fold_left max a.(0) a)
